name: Chocolate Chip Treasure Cookies
recipeInstructions: Mix graham cracker crumbs, flour, and baking powder. In a large mixing bowl, beat sweetened condensed milk and butter until smooth. Add the dry mixture and mix well. Stir in coconut flakes, chocolate chips, and walnuts. Drop by rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets. Bake at 375°F for 9 - 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
